message: Command `Write-Output "=== FILE: auth_api/routes/users.py (lines 2-200) ===" ; Get-Content "auth_api/routes/users.py" -Encoding UTF8 | Select-Object -Skip 1 -First 199 ; Write-Output "=== FILE: auth_api/main.py (lines 2-200) ===" ; Get-Content "auth_api/main.py" -Encoding UTF8 | Select-Object -Skip 1 -First 199` executed with exit code 1.
content:
=== FILE: auth_api/routes/users.py (lines 2-200) ===
from typing import List
from auth_api.models import USERS, UserOut
from auth_api.auth import get_current_user

router = APIRouter(prefix="/users")

@router.get("/me", response_model=UserOut)
async def get_me(current_user: UserOut = Depends(get_current_user)):
    return current_user

@router.get("/", response_model=List[UserOut])
async def get_users(current_user: UserOut = Depends(get_current_user)):
    return [UserOut(id=u.id, username=u.username, email=u.email) for u in USERS]

@router.put("/{user_id}", response_model=UserOut)
async def update_user(user_id: int, email: str, current_user: UserOut = Depends(get_current_user)):
    user = next((u for u in USERS if u.id == user_id), None)
    if not user:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="User not found")
    user.email = email
    return UserOut(id=user.id, username=user.username, email=user.email)

@router.delete("/{user_id}")
async def delete_user(user_id: int, current_user: UserOut = Depends(get_current_user)):
    user = next((u for u in USERS if u.id == user_id), None)
    if not user:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="User not found")
    USERS.remove(user)
    return {"deleted": user_id}
=== FILE: auth_api/main.py (lines 2-200) ===
